prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: early product logo mascot exploration for CopayGuard, a healthcare cost/copay protection product
Style/medium: polished 2D animated character mascot logo, vector-friendly, clean silhouette, modern fintech-healthcare brand, friendly but credible
Composition/framing: centered mascot holding a shield, full character visible, generous padding, simple light background, app-icon-ready, strong readable shape at small size
Color palette: teal, navy, white, and a restrained warm accent; avoid red cross branding
Constraints: no written text, no letters, no watermark, no photorealism, no busy background, no copyrighted medical symbols, shield must be prominent
Avoid: scary, childish, hospital logo clone, insurance-company generic, cluttered details, fake text
Concept direction: a friendly round guardian character with a small cape, confidently holding a clean shield with a subtle medical plus shape built from negative space, approachable and trustworthy.
